title: AuditAnchorSegmentRequest
description: Explicit broker-owned local anchor action request for one sealed segment digest.

seal_digest.description: Digest identity of the target AuditSegmentSeal envelope.

approval_decision_digest.description: Optional approval decision digest linked to this anchor request.

signer_logical_scope.description: Optional logical signer scope for audit_anchor signing.

challenge.description: Caller-provided trusted-domain challenge nonce for local user presence.

acknowledgment_token.description: Trusted-domain acknowledgment token bound to presence_mode, seal_digest, and challenge.

presence_attestation.description: Optional explicit local presence attestation; required by signer when presence_mode is os_confirmation or hardware_touch.

export_receipt_copy.description: When true, request a best-effort exported receipt copy in artifact store.
